meta_title: For Freelancers: design with AI to Solve can't debug code (Intermediate Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome can't debug code. A Intermediate-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Design with AI to Solve Debugging Issues
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with broken code. Learn how to design with AI using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship projects faster and impress your clients today.
content.answer_block: Stop fighting syntax errors and logic traps. By shifting your workflow from manual debugging to AI-assisted design, you leverage Claude Code for rapid resolution and Antigravity for structural integrity. This combination allows you to architect robust, production-ready features while slashing development time by up to 70% per client project.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, the client is pinging you on Slack, and your terminal is a graveyard of red stack traces. We have all been there: staring at a recursive function that refuses to terminate or a state management bug that defies all logic. When you are a freelancer, your time is your inventory; spending six hours debugging a UI component is a direct hit to your profit margin.

But what if you stopped 'debugging' and started 'designing'? By integrating advanced AI agents into your development lifecycle, you move from being a reactive error-fixer to an proactive architect. This guide maps out the professional workflow to transform your coding process, ensuring you ship cleaner code, faster, and with significantly less cognitive load.

steps.title: Architectural Blueprinting
steps.description: Before writing code, define the logic flow. This prevents errors before they manifest as bugs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the existing component structure and propose a more modular architecture to prevent state synchronization issues.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --architect 'Review current file structure for potential race conditions'

steps.title: Contextual Error Analysis
steps.description: Feed specific error logs into your AI to identify the root cause instantly instead of guessing.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Identify the root cause of this stack trace and suggest a refactor that avoids this pattern entirely.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --debug 'Analyze the last 50 lines of error logs and provide a fix'

steps.title: Unit Test Generation
steps.description: Automate the creation of test suites to ensure your fixes don't break existing functionality.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write Jest unit tests for this function covering edge cases like null values and empty arrays.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --test 'Generate comprehensive tests for the current module'

steps.title: Refactoring for Readability
steps.description: Clean up messy codebases that are prone to bugs, making them maintainable for future client updates.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor this legacy code to use modern async/await patterns and improve type safety.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --refactor 'Simplify logic and apply strict TypeScript types'

steps.title: Deployment Verification
steps.description: Perform a final automated check to confirm the fix is stable before pushing to production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the final implementation against production best practices and security standards.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --verify 'Check for production readiness and security vulnerabilities'

pro_tips: Always use the --architect flag in Claude Code to force the AI to explain the 'why' behind a fix, not just the 'what'.
Keep your Antigravity prompts focused on 'system constraints' rather than 'code syntax' to avoid hallucinated libraries.
Run your error logs through a local JSON formatter before feeding them into the AI to improve token efficiency.
Treat your AI as a junior developer: perform a brief code review on every suggestion it provides to maintain quality control.
Maintain a 'knowledge-base.md' file in your project root; feed this into your AI agents to keep them aligned with your unique coding style.
content.next_steps: Integrate these AI agents into your CI/CD pipeline to automate the debugging process permanently.
content.conversion_block: Stop wasting hours on manual debugging and start delivering high-value, error-free software that makes your clients rave about your speed. You have the tools, the workflow, and the strategy to dominate your niche. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
